subject: Project Management
title: Agile Beyond Software
description: A short lesson to help you apply Agile Beyond Software.

hook.text: Agile started in software. Now it's in marketing, HR, education, and even farming.

buildup.text: Marketing teams run two-week sprints. Schools use retrospectives. Lawyers hold standups.

discovery.text: The core ideas — iterate, get feedback, adapt — work anywhere people tackle uncertainty.

twist.text: Some adoptions are superficial — renaming meetings without changing mindset. 'Agile theater.'

climax.text: Agile's principles are universal. Its practices need translation for each new domain.

punchline.text: The method is specific. The mindset is universal.

quiz.question: What is 'Agile theater'?
options: Adopting Agile ceremonies without changing mindset
Using Agile to manage theater productions
